# **Draft Announcement: odin-tools cluster has been merged into ETL cluster**

The **Experiments and Insights** team previously operated the prod-odin-tools-emr6 cluster, which handled critical workloads but had become increasingly unreliable. This was due to known risks associated with small, team-specific clusters that relied on **spot instances**, leading to frequent **InsufficientCapacityErrors** when AWS couldn’t provide the required capacity. These issues resulted in several [escalations](https://slack-pde.slack.com/archives/C8EDM9MGA/p1741646745665739).

Thanks to the great work by **Tayven Taylor**, **Patrick Le Chi**, and the **odin-tools team**, we successfully merged the prod-odin-tools-emr6 cluster into the shared **root.team-experimentation-and-insights queue** on the **prod-etl-emr6** cluster. This consolidated cluster runs exclusively on **on-demand instances** with **ODCR guarantees**, greatly improving reliability.

The chart below shows that the migration was completed on **May 8**, with the legacy cluster fully **terminated by May 21**. It also illustrates that we achieved **nearly full cost savings** from the odin-tools cluster post-consolidation—further validating our roadmap to **merge clusters for both reliability and cost efficiency**.

[Cost Chart](https://us-east-1.console.aws.amazon.com/costmanagement/home?region=us-east-1#/cost-explorer?chartStyle=STACK&costAggregate=netAmortizedCost&endDate=2025-05-27&excludeForecasting=false&filter=%5B%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22CostCategoryName%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Cost%20category%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Data%20Infrastructure%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22value%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Automatic%20-%20Omni%20Team%20Name%22%7D%7D,%7B%22dimension%22:%7B%22id%22:%22TagKey%22,%22displayValue%22:%22Tag%22%7D,%22operator%22:%22INCLUDES%22,%22values%22:%5B%7B%22value%22:%22prod-etl-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-etl-emr6%22%7D,%7B%22value%22:%22prod-odin-tools-emr6%22,%22displayValue%22:%22prod-odin-tools-emr6%22%7D%5D,%22growableValue%22:%7B%22displayValue%22:%22Name%22,%22value%22:%22Name%22%7D%7D%5D&futureRelativeRange=CUSTOM&granularity=Daily&groupBy=%5B%22TagKeyValue:Name%22%5D&historicalRelativeRange=CUSTOM&isDefault=false&reportArn=arn:aws:ce::122735864621:ce-saved-report%2F917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportId=917c2af4-d19c-4f95-8345-8269e68cb11a&reportName=EMR%2012%20Cluster%20Cost%20Report&showOnlyUncategorized=false&showOnlyUntagged=false&startDate=2025-03-27&usageAggregate=undefined&useNormalizedUnits=false)  
![][image1]

The following chart ([https://analytics.tinyspeck.com/v3/explore/1000000001711522](https://analytics.tinyspeck.com/v3/explore/1000000001711522)) shows the application success rate before and after the consolidation.
